easy.title: Create Title Variations for a Blog
easy.description: Create an HTML page that shows five different blog post titles properly formatted using the <title> element. Write a single HTML document where the <title> changes based on the page content. Create 5 variations: Home page, About page, Contact page, Blog post page, and 404 error page. Save each as a separate HTML file.
easy.starterCode:
Welcome to My Blog

Create variations for: About, Contact, Blog Post, and 404 pages.
easy.solution:
My Blog

Home About Contact

Getting Started with HTML

Learn the basics of HTML in this comprehensive guide...

medium.title: Build a Hierarchical Title System
medium.description: Create a multi-page website (3-4 pages) with a hierarchical title system that follows SEO best practices. Each page title should follow the format: 'Page Name - Section - Site Name'. Include a Home page, Services page, Products page, and Contact page. Ensure each title is descriptive, under 60 characters, and includes a pipe separator.
medium.starterCode:
My Business

Home Services Products Contact
medium.solution:
Our Services

Home Services Products Contact

What We Offer

  • Web Design
  • Web Development
  • SEO Optimization
  • Maintenance

© 2026 MyBusiness

hard.title: Build an SEO-Optimized News Portal
hard.description: Create a news portal with a dynamic title system optimized for search engines. Include a breaking news ticker, article categories, and a search feature. The <title> tags must follow SEO patterns: 'Primary Keyword - Secondary Keyword | Brand Name'. Include schema.org structured data and ensure every page has a unique, descriptive title under 55 characters. At minimum, create 5 interconnected pages.
hard.starterCode: Daily News Portal
hard.solution:
Daily News Portal

Breaking: Global Summit begins in Geneva | Stock markets reach all-time high
